title: UTS Season 8 Kicks Off Registration: A National Scripture Competition for Young Adults - FinancialEDGE

html:
Registration is now open for UTS Season 8 – Understanding The Scriptures (UTS), Nigeria’s premier Bible knowledge competition for youths aged 20 to 30. Organized by Bethel Dwellerz, this highly anticipated annual event aims to deepen participants’ understanding of Scripture while fostering a spirit of healthy competition among Christian youths nationwide.

Themed “Raising Battle Axes for the Lord“, this year’s edition promises a dynamic blend of online and in-person engagements, challenging contestants on biblical accuracy, interpretation, and application.

Key Dates to Note

Registration Deadline: October 13, 2025

Online Stages (1–3): October 15, 18 & 21, 2025

Grand Finale: October 29 & 30, 2025

Registration Fee: ₦3,050
Register Online: www.betheldwellerz.org/uts

Over the years, UTS has evolved into a respected national platform, attracting hundreds of participants annually and offering cash prizes, mentorship opportunities, and national recognition.

The Convener, Ayowande Orelaja, explained that Understanding The Scriptures (UTS) is a Bible quiz project whose core aim is to bring people back to the Scriptures. He added that it is also a platform where young people can grow spiritually, connect with others who share a passion for the Word of God, and be rewarded with a cash prize. He concluded by blessing all those who will participate.

The Quiz Master, Temitope Ogunrinde, reflected on his experience and said that as the Quiz Master of Understanding the Scriptures (UTS), he has had the privilege of sharing the stage with contestants whose passion and depth of knowledge of the Bible continue to inspire and even challenge him. He emphasized that this is what makes his role so fulfilling. He also expressed his belief that many more young people share this same love and passion for the Scriptures, and he looks forward to welcoming them on stage in the upcoming season.

Participants are encouraged to register early to secure their spot and begin preparations for the rigorous and enriching competition ahead.

Understanding The Scriptures (UTS) is an annual Bible-based competition curated by Bethel Dwellerz. It is designed to equip young adults with sound biblical knowledge, inspire spiritual growth, and build a community of Christ-centered leaders across Nigeria.
